title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; install via npm.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embedding providers.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, RAG, multi-user); rebranded as Open WebUI.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers synchronous & async APIs and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rails
summary: Ruby gem that wraps Ollama’s REST API for easy integration into Rails apps.

title: ollama-cli (go-llama)
summary: Unofficial Go CLI with interactive chat, model benchmarking, and GPU monitoring.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Simple Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter template exposing Ollama endpoints with JWT auth and rate limiting.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Qt6 and C++.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store; includes FastAPI service.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible builds of Ollama and curated models.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision Ollama on AWS EC2 GPU instances with auto-shutdown.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment config for scaling Ollama models across a Ray cluster.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with async streaming.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.
